title: draba repens var. affinis
intro: Draba repens var. affinis, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass or Yellow Whitlow Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Draba repens var. affinis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Draba repens var. affinis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various skin conditions and other health issues.
